versions.version_description: This version of One Direction's Drag Me Down is the one used by One Direction's bassist.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Sorry if this is a bit wrong, the chords are a little bit in the wrong place, but it 
shouldn't be too hard to work out as you go along!

Capo 2nd

[ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I've got fire for a heart, I'm not scared of the dark[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
You've never seen it look so easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
I got a river for a soul and baby you're a bow[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, you're my only reason[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
If I didn't have you there would be nothing left[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
A shell of a man that could never be his best[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
If I didn't have you I'd never see the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You taught me how to be someone, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
All my life you stood by me when no one else was ever behind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
All these lights that can't blind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
With your love, nobody can drag me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
All my life you stood by me when no one else was ever behind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
All these lights that can't blind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
With your love, nobody can drag me down[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Nobody, nobody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Can drag me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Nobody, nobody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Can drag me down[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
I've got fire for a heart, I'm not scared of the dark[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
You've never seen it look so easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
I got a river for a soul and baby you're a bow[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
And baby you're my only reason[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
If I didn't have you there would be nothing left[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
A shell of a man who could never be his best[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
If I didn't have you I'd never see the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You taught me how to be someone, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus] x2

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
All my life you stood by me when no one else was ever behind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
All these lights that can't blind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
With your love, nobody can drag me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
But you're love, nobody can drag me down[/tab]
